rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Pipeline max_turns crash during review stage caused the fix to never be applied — the build agent wrote the plan but never executed the edits.","scope":"review stage"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When a stage depends on a prior stage (P2T06), verify the fix actually exists in the changeset before marking the stage complete.","scope":"verification"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The engine fix requires editing `node_modules/@kody-ade/engine/dist/bin/cli.js` directly; changes to project scaffolding alone do not satisfy the task.","scope":"build stage"}]}
